# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Engineering Blog"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="article" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Release notes"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          "Today we launched a new parser pipeline."
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          "It improves chunked streaming behavior."
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="aside" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
            "By J. Doe"
        "\n"
      "\n"
